---
name: Design Proposal
about: Propose a new algorithm, feature, or interface design
title: "[Design] "
labels: design
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the proposed design.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Design

Describe the algorithm, data flow, or interface. Use plain math for formulas.
Keep language stack-agnostic — mention likely technologies only in parentheses.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were evaluated and why were they rejected?

## Impact

Which `Plan/` files would be created or modified?

## Open Questions

List anything that still needs to be decided.
